components.name: React SPA
components.description: Single-page app with /dashboard and /summary routes. All routes require auth.

components.name: Firebase Authentication
components.description: Google OAuth restricted to company Workspace domain (hd parameter).

components.name: Firestore
components.description: Document database with security rules enforcing per-user ownership.

components.name: Firestore Security Rules
components.description: Enforces ownerUid match on writes and isTeamMember check. Second auth layer.

components.name: Cloud Function: checkMembership
components.description: Checks Google Directory API for group membership on login. Fail-closed.

components.name: Google Directory API
components.description: Checks Google Group membership. Called via service account with domain-wide delegation.

components.name: Google Group (team membership)
components.description: Source of truth for team membership. Managed in Google Workspace admin.

actors.name: TeamMember
actors.description: Engineer in the Google Group. Can post and edit their own WorkItems.

actors.name: Viewer
actors.description: Any company employee authenticated via Google. Read-only.

actors.name: VP / Leadership
actors.description: Accesses /summary for stakeholder reporting. Can share URL or copy text.

actors.name: Malicious Insider
actors.description: Company employee attempting XSS injection or unauthorized writes.

actors.name: External Attacker
actors.description: Outside attacker attempting to access dashboard. Blocked by domain restriction.

flows.label: Google OAuth login
flows.description: Triggers checkMembership Cloud Function on success.

flows.label: Group membership query
flows.description: Service account call. Writes isTeamMember to Firestore. Fails closed.

flows.label: Create/edit WorkItem
flows.description: Blocked by Firestore rules if isTeamMember != true or ownerUid != caller.

flows.label: Read all WorkItems (real-time)
flows.description: onSnapshot listener. Any authenticated user can read.

flows.label: Generate/copy summary
flows.description: Renders /summary route. Requires Google auth. URL shareable within company only.

threats.title: Summary leaked externally
mitigations: All routes require Google Workspace auth

threats.title: Stale/failed membership check grants wrong access
External attacker accesses dashboard
mitigations: Google OAuth hd parameter restricts to company domain
